text: now like if else, there is another block of statements which we call else if statements
in else if statements, first we define the first condition in if
suppose we have to define the second condition also
so what we have learnt before this
that first write if and then condition 1
after that write if again and then condition 2
and in the same way code goes till the bottom
but there is also a thing called else if
what will it do? first it will check
suppose this is executed
so next time it will check this also
whether the above one is true or false
in if always condition is checked
but we want that if the above condition is true
then our condition should not be checked
for such cases we use else if
if if is written again and again
then it will be checked every time
but if else if is written then if the above if is true
then this check will not be done
if above if is false
then only else if condition will be checked
in else if condition we first write else
then we write if after giving space
after that we define our condition
and then we write our block of code
in which we can write multiple lines
like if I take an example of adult
so if I have to do classification in that
so how can we do it?
we can take age as 13
and what we can do?
if age is greater than equal to 18
in that case we will print adult
else if age is greater than equal to 13
and age is less than 18
so if age is between 13 to 18
in that case we want to print teenager
and in other cases we want to print child
so what will it do?
code will do like this
if this condition is true
suppose if age is 22
so in that case we will first go here
if this condition is true
then there will be no check in both of them
means we will not waste our energy
in checking them
but if this condition is 13
so if it is false here
then we will go inside this else if
and check the condition
so basically by writing else if
compiler's computational time is saved
that how much effort he is doing
to check the same conditions
if we write if here
and we write here 22
so in that case what happens?
this condition is true
after that this condition is also checked
whether it is true or false
that is later
but compiler does check
we have saved the compiler's check
saved an extra check
if I run this code
then it will be printed for age 13
my output is teenager
